description_long: This helmet features a rounded dome shape with a predominantly green exterior, accented by a maroon horizontal band encircling the lower half. The front is distinguished by a T-shaped black visor, bordered by maroon trim, providing a bold and iconic appearance. On the right side, a vertical black attachment with a circular detail is present, while the left side features a raised stalk with a rectangular sensor or rangefinder at the top, colored in black and gold. The surface of the helmet is textured with visible scuffs and wear, suggesting a rugged, metallic construction. Small yellow rectangular markings are visible on the upper right side, adding a touch of detail to the otherwise solid color scheme. The interior is not visible, but the helmet appears hollow and designed to fit over a human head.
description: A rugged, green dome-shaped helmet with a maroon band, black T-shaped visor, and a distinctive side-mounted rangefinder. The surface is worn and textured, with yellow markings and metallic details.
description_view_0: Front-right view showing the T-shaped black visor, maroon trim, yellow markings, and the black vertical attachment on the right side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the smooth green dome, maroon band, and the gold-and-black rangefinder stalk extending upward on the left.
description_view_2: Front-left view focusing on the rangefinder stalk and its gold base, with the visor partially visible.
description_view_3: Direct front view displaying the full T-shaped visor, maroon trim, and symmetrical helmet shape.
attribute_graphic_design: Solid green with a maroon band, yellow rectangular markings, and minor scuff details; no elaborate graphics.
